title: Masala Dosa
description: Crispy rice and lentil crepe filled with spiced potato. A South Indian breakfast classic.

steps.summary: Prepare dosa batter by grinding rice and dal.
subSteps: Soak rice and urad dal separately for 4 hours.
Grind urad dal first until it becomes light and fluffy (about 10 minutes).
Add rice gradually and grind until smooth batter forms.
Mix in salt and let batter ferment overnight or 6-8 hours.
The batter should almost double in volume.
steps.tip: Fermented batter gives crispy dosas. You can skip fermentation but crispy texture may vary.

subSteps: Boil potatoes until soft and peel.
Mash potatoes lightly, keeping some chunks.
Heat ghee in a pan, add mustard seeds and let them pop.
Add curry leaves, green chillies, and onions.
Add mashed potatoes, turmeric, and salt.
Cook for 2 minutes and mix well.

steps.summary: Cook crispy dosas on a griddle.
subSteps: Heat a dosa griddle or non-stick pan on high heat.
Pour a ladleful of batter in the center.
Immediately spread in circular motions to make thin crepe.
When the bottom is golden, add a spoonful of filling.
Fold into triangle or roll and serve hot.
Serve with sambar and coconut chutney.
steps.tip: Use a spreader or the back of ladle to spread batter thin. First dosa might be imperfect — that's normal!

seo.metaTitle: Masala Dosa Recipe — Crispy South Indian Breakfast
seo.metaDescription: Make crispy masala dosa at home with detailed step-by-step instructions for batter and filling.
